source_label: Pexels side-view suspension trainer tricep press
review_gallery_note: Packaged only so the web Motion Review mannequin overlay can be judged; this remains blocked from guide-ready and validation-ready promotion.

rejected_sources.review_scope: Promotion review retained the Pexels 8435987 side-view suspension-trainer source and no alternate rejected source-candidate records were preserved in this slice.
rejected_sources.reason: The accepted source is pinned by source page, license, attribution, raw trace, normalizer, visual review, engine replay, and artifact integrity. Future source changes must add rejected_candidates before promotion.

golden_comparison.reason: No protected suspension tricep press golden comparator exists yet; Bodyweight Lunge remains the protected lunge-family extractor comparator.
